task_completion.description: The agent navigated to the Library of Congress Online Catalog.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open with 'catalog.loc.gov' in the address bar or the Library of Congress catalog homepage is visible.

task_completion.description: The agent searched for the first book (ISBN 9780465050659).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser shows the Library of Congress catalog record or search results for 'The Design of Everyday Things' or ISBN 9780465050659.

task_completion.description: The agent searched for the second book (ISBN 9780374275631).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser shows the Library of Congress catalog record or search results for 'Thinking, Fast and Slow' or ISBN 9780374275631.

task_completion.description: The agent searched for the third book (ISBN 9780618249060).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser shows the Library of Congress catalog record or search results for 'Silent Spring' or ISBN 9780618249060.

task_completion.description: The agent created the shelf_list.txt file on the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal is open showing a file named 'shelf_list.txt' being edited or saved in the '/home/ga/Desktop/' directory.

task_completion.description: The shelf_list.txt file contains the correct information for all three books in the specified format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains three lines, each formatted as 'ISBN | Title | LC Classification | LCCN'. The values must match the verified information provided in the privileged info (e.g., Book 3 must have LCCN 2002726803).

integrity.description: The agent retrieved the information from catalog.loc.gov.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser history or visible tabs show interaction with catalog.loc.gov, rather than just searching Google, Amazon, or Wikipedia for the call numbers.

integrity.description: The agent created the output file in the environment.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent used a text editor (like nano, vim, gedit) or bash commands (like echo, cat) to write the file, rather than just typing the answer in the chat interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not guess the LCCNs or Call Numbers.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent actually opened the catalog records for the books to read the LC Classification and LCCN before writing them to the file.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Verified data for the shelf_list.txt file:
Book 1: ISBN 9780465050659 | Title: The Design of Everyday Things | LC Classification: TS171.4 .N67 2013 | LCCN: 2013024417
Book 2: ISBN 9780374275631 | Title: Thinking, Fast and Slow | LC Classification: BF441.K238 2011 | LCCN: 2011027143
Book 3: ISBN 9780618249060 | Title: Silent Spring | LC Classification: QH545.P4 C38 2002 (or SB959.C3) | LCCN: 2002726803 (Note: 2002073994 is incorrect for this edition).
Format required: ISBN | Title | LC Classification | LCCN. Spacing around the pipes (|) and minor variations in the title or call number spacing are acceptable.
